rules.name: Order Cancellation Rate — Layering Indicator
rules.description: Detects high order cancellation rate combined with opposite-side orders on same instrument

rules.name: Proprietary Trade Ahead of Customer Order
rules.description: Detects proprietary trading in same direction as pending customer order

rules.name: Related Account Round-Trip Trading
rules.description: Detects buy and sell of same instrument between related/affiliated accounts

rules.name: Restricted List Violation
rules.description: Detects trading in instrument on firm restricted list
rules.regulatory_basis: SEC Rule 10b-5; Regulation FD; FINRA Rule 3110

rules.name: End-of-Day Concentration — Marking the Close
rules.description: Detects disproportionate trading volume in final 30 minutes of trading session

rules.name: Short Sale Without Locate
rules.description: Detects short sale execution without documented locate or failure to deliver

rules.name: Excessive Trading — Portfolio Turnover
rules.description: Detects annualized portfolio turnover exceeding threshold for account type

rules.name: Best Execution — Systematic Price Deviation
rules.description: Detects systematic execution prices worse than NBBO by threshold amount
